checkoutAfterCheckin: Check-out inofanira kuva mushure mezuva recheck-in.
selectGuest: Ndapota sarudza muenzi mumwe kana vanopfuura.
roomUnavailable: Kamuri iri harisisiri kuwanikwa pamazuva ako.
networkError: Dambudziko renetwork. Tarisa connection yako uye edza zvakare.
acceptTerms: Ndapota bvuma mitemo yekubhuka kuti uenderere mberi.
waitBeforeSubmit: Ndapota mira kashoma usati watumira zvakare.
unableCreateBooking: Hatikwanise kugadzira booking. Ndapota edza zvakare.
selectBothDates: Ndapota sarudza mazuva ese echeck-in necheck-out.
selectDatesBelow: Sarudza mazuva ako pazasi, wobva watsvaga makamuri aripo.
